intraday.summary: Expect continued weakness into close as geopolitical tensions and rate hike fears dominate. Defensive rotation likely with tech underperformance
intraday.key_driver: Iran war escalation fears driving oil shock and stagflation concerns

next_day.summary: Oil price shock and rate hike expectations should weigh heavily on risk assets. Small caps particularly vulnerable
next_day.key_driver: G7 emergency oil reserve release decision and Iran retaliation risks

long_term.summary: Stagflation scenario emerging with war-driven inflation forcing central banks to maintain/raise rates despite growth concerns
long_term.key_driver: Reversal of rate cut expectations due to geopolitical inflation shock

news_impact: Iran war escalation dominates with oil shock implications. Rate hike expectations surging in Europe, likely to spread to Fed. Private credit stress (JPM tightening) signals broader financial conditions deterioration. Stagflation narrative building rapidly
options_flow_impact: Neutral P/C ratio masks extreme positioning in individual names. Massive ITM put trades in META/MSFT likely synthetic longs, not bearish bets. However, AAPL near-term put buying and overall defensive flow suggest institutional hedging for downside
risks: Iran de-escalation could trigger violent relief rally
Fed/ECB could signal dovish stance despite inflation
Options expiration Friday could create volatility squeeze

tickers_to_watch.reason: Small caps most vulnerable to stagflation - higher rates crush growth while inflation hits margins
Today's outlier strength likely to reverse as reality of higher rates impacts high-multiple growth
Energy sector direct beneficiary of oil shock and geopolitical premium

trade_ideas.idea: Buy IWM 250/245 put spread expiring March 21
trade_ideas.thesis: Small caps breaking down as stagflation fears mount. Technical support at 250 likely to fail
trade_ideas.risk: Sharp relief rally if Iran tensions ease

trade_ideas.thesis: Today's 2% rally unsustainable given macro backdrop. Fade the outlier strength
trade_ideas.risk: Momentum could extend if breaks above 410

trade_ideas.idea: Long XLE shares or April 95 calls
